about.heading: About Me
about.intro: I'm Nathan Levy, a Full-Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of professional experience, based in Melbourne, Australia.
about.paragraph1: My coding journey started at 13 with developing a video-game addon. Since then I've evolved into a lead developer working across diverse tech stacks and industries.
about.paragraph2: I've built everything from fintech platforms and data pipelines to custom surveying applications, using technologies like React, Node.js, Python, AWS, and PostgreSQL.
